S.FORM: Norm Baker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Norm Baker, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: norm Œ≤aker s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj **** , rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, norm Œ≤aker, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
